summary: Frontend-only testing of the new AssignTeacherModal feature on /(tabs)/courses page. Verified inline teacher chip/button on each course row, the reusable modal (API mode + formMode), search filter, same-dept toggle, same-dept assignment, cross-dept assignment with window.confirm, removal of teacher, and embedded usage inside the course edit form. All 6 critical flows passed; backend PUT /api/courses/{id} was invoked with correct payloads.

test_results.row_inline_buttons: PASS — 5 change-teacher chips + 5 assign-teacher buttons rendered after applying filter (semester=all, dept=all). testIDs change-teacher-{id} and assign-teacher-{id} present.
test_results.modal_open_and_testids: PASS — assign-teacher-modal opens. teacher-search-input, same-dept-toggle, pick-no-teacher, save-assign-teacher-btn, cancel-assign-btn all present.
test_results.search_filter: PASS — typing 'Saeed' filters to 1 row; typing 'zzzzzz' filters to 0 rows.
test_results.same_dept_toggle: PASS — toggle ON reduces 3 rows -> 2 rows (cross-dept hidden).
test_results.badges: PASS — modal showed 1 green 'نفس القسم' badge and 2 orange 'عابر للقسم' badges based on teacher dept vs. course dept.
test_results.save_same_dept: PASS — picked same-dept teacher, modal closed, row updated immediately to change-teacher chip, PUT /api/courses/{id} body={"teacher_id":"698e533beb4c6eb021c50302"}.
test_results.save_cross_dept_confirm: PASS — picked عابر للقسم teacher, window.confirm auto-accepted, modal closed, PUT body={"teacher_id":"698bc0593a8982391e9ba188"}.
test_results.remove_assignment: PASS — pick-no-teacher then save; row reverted to 'إسناد معلم' blue button (assign-teacher-{id}); PUT body={"teacher_id":null}.
test_results.form_mode_picker_in_edit: PASS — Edit modal shows open-teacher-picker-btn with current teacher name + 'اضغط للتغيير أو البحث'. Click opens same modal with formMode=true. Picking a teacher + save closes modal, updates form state (button text changes from Saeed -> زين سالم), and does NOT trigger a PUT call (0 PUT during formMode save) — exactly as expected.

critical_code_review_comments: Initial UX requires user to manually change semester filter from default 'الفصل النشط' to 'كل الفصول' (or pick a dept) before clicking 'تطبيق الفلتر' to see courses; if only the default semester is left selected and 'تطبيق الفلتر' is clicked, the table stays empty without an explicit message — minor UX nit but not a regression caused by this feature.
AssignTeacherModal.tsx is 342 lines, clean and well-typed. No DRY issues; uses api service; correctly delegates to formMode without API call.
seed_data_creation: None — modified one existing course (دراسات حضرموت) teacher_id multiple times during test (same-dept -> cross-dept -> null). Final state for that course = null (no teacher).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Filter requires explicit selection (semester=all or dept=all + click تطبيق الفلتر) to render rows; the page intentionally starts with empty state. AssignTeacherModal is shared between row-quick-assign and the form's teacher picker via formMode prop. Active sem id = 6a21bee0ddb8d04530cf65f4. Note: the test mutated course id 69cd1f0b12f04e7c1d6a4992 (دراسات حضرموت) teacher_id to null at end — main agent may want to re-assign Saeed back if needed.
